summary: Winter show is praised, but the tape suffers from a distant, thin sound.
review: Listeners note that this winter performance has an appealing vibe and overall good set, yet the recording quality is described as distant and thin by some reviewers. While one fan rates the tape highly, another finds the audio lacking clarity, resulting in mixed impressions of the release.

ai_rating.rationale: One reviewer gives a high rating for both show and tape, another rates the recording poorly; averaging these yields a mid‑range score with moderate confidence due to only two mixed reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as distant and thin by one reviewer, while another calls it a great tape; overall the sound is acceptable but lacks clarity.
